overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a dystopian neon-lit city. The player character moves from a narrow metal-grated alley through a muddy open area beneath an elevated highway, then ascends concrete stairs to an upper-level walkway lined with holographic billboards and vibrant signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with metal grating walkway

events.description: exits narrow metal alley into open muddy area beneath overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow metal-grated alleyway between concrete walls and vending machines

entered.detail: metal grate flooring covering the narrow alley ground
tall concrete walls lining the right side of the alley
red and yellow vending machine against the wall
tall buildings with glowing neon signs visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow enclosed alleyway with metal grating underfoot. Concrete walls line the right side with a red and yellow vending machine visible. Neon-lit buildings glow in the distant background. The player walks forward through this confined space before transitioning to an open area around the 10-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: open muddy area under elevated highway with large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: walking across muddy terrain littered with debris and abandoned vehicles, approaching the overpass structure

entered.detail: wet muddy earth with puddles reflecting neon lights
tall digital billboard displaying a face advertisement
massive concrete overpass structure spanning overhead
derelict cars and debris scattered on the muddy ground

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide muddy area beneath an elevated highway overpass. The ground is wet and littered with abandoned vehicles. A large vertical digital billboard dominates the left side of the frame, displaying advertisements. The player continues walking forward through this desolate open space toward a staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete staircase ascending to upper walkway beneath overpass

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs alongside retaining wall
reaches top of stairs and enters elevated pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs alongside a retaining wall, passing under glowing neon signs including a purple TENKU sign

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading upward to the next level
tall concrete wall running alongside the staircase
purple neon sign with TENKU text under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and begins ascending a concrete staircase at 30 seconds, moving from the muddy ground level up toward an elevated walkway. The stairs run alongside a concrete retaining wall beneath the overpass structure. A prominent purple neon sign reading TENKU becomes visible on the right. At 42 seconds, the player reaches the top and transitions onto the upper walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with safety railings and neon advertisements

events.description: turns left following the curved walkway path

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated concrete walkway with metal railings, passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walks past the player in the opposite direction on the walkway

entered.detail: wide concrete pedestrian walkway at upper level
metal safety railings lining the left side of the walkway
metal safety railings lining the right side of the walkway
green neon arrow sign pointing direction on the right

segments.scene_description: The player emerges onto an elevated concrete walkway with metal safety railings on both sides. The path curves gently through a canyon of neon-lit buildings and holographic advertisements. At approximately 48 seconds, a pedestrian walks past in the opposite direction. Around 58 seconds, the player follows the curve of the walkway, turning left while continuing forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved elevated walkway with continuous neon signage and building facades

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved elevated walkway, passing illuminated storefronts and towering holographic advertisements

entered.detail: building fronts covered in bright neon signs and illuminated windows
large floating holographic advertisements in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the curved elevated walkway, now moving past vibrant neon building facades on the right. The safety railings recede to the left mid-ground as the path curves. Holographic billboards glow in the center distance, and the dense urban canyon of the cyberpunk city surrounds the player as they walk forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a confined industrial alleyway into a desolate open underpass and finally up to an elevated urban walkway. It begins within a narrow enclosed space with metal grating underfoot and concrete walls, passing a red and yellow vending machine while neon buildings glow in the distance. As the camera moves forward, the confined alley opens into a wide, muddy area beneath an elevated highway overpass littered with abandoned vehicles and dominated by a large vertical digital billboard. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches and ascends a concrete staircase alongside a retaining wall, where a prominent purple neon sign reading TENKU comes into view. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera reaches the top of the stairs and transitions onto the upper-level walkway.

The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a curving elevated walkway that winds deeper into a dense, neon-lit urban canyon. It begins as the camera emerges onto a concrete path flanked by metal safety railings, moving through a corridor of towering buildings and glowing holographic advertisements. As the camera progresses, a lone pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction before the path curves gently to the left. The scene then expands to reveal vibrant neon facades lining the right side of the walkway, while the railings recede into the mid-ground. Finally, the camera continues forward, drawing closer to the brilliant holographic billboards that illuminate the heart of the cyberpunk city.
